homepage.heroSubline: Premium flooring installation and repair services across Long Beach. Get the job done right, the first time.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Flooring Excellence in Long Beach
aboutText: Juan's Carpet Co. started with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach residents with exceptional flooring services they can trust. Founded by Juan Hernandez over a decade ago, we've built our reputation on hard work, integrity, and a relentless commitment to quality. We are a local business, deeply rooted in the Long Beach community.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, assess your space, and recommend the best flooring solutions for your budget and lifestyle. We use only the highest quality materials and employ skilled installers who take pride in their craftsmanship. We're not satisfied until you are.

We believe in giving back to the community that has supported us. Juan's Carpet Co. regularly partners with local organizations and charities to support initiatives that improve the lives of Long Beach residents. We are committed to making Long Beach a better place to live, one floor at a time.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Precision and care in every installation, ensuring lasting beauty and durability.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand the unique challenges of Long Beach homes and provide tailored solutions.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote for your flooring project. Call us now!

services.name: Hardwood Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Timeless elegance and lasting value with expert hardwood installation.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring adds warmth and sophistication to any Long Beach home. At Juan's Carpet Co., we specialize in the expert installation of all types of hardwood, from classic oak to exotic Brazilian cherry. We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation and moisture control, especially crucial in Long Beach's coastal climate. Our experienced installers ensure a flawless finish that will last for years to come.

We handle every step of the process, from removing old flooring to installing new baseboards. We work with both solid and engineered hardwood, offering a wide range of styles, colors, and finishes to match your aesthetic. Whether you're renovating a Craftsman bungalow in Belmont Shore or updating a condo near the waterfront, we have the perfect hardwood flooring solution for you.

Given Long Beach's exposure to intense sunlight, we recommend UV-resistant finishes to protect your hardwood from fading and discoloration. We also advise on proper maintenance and care to keep your hardwood floors looking their best for decades.
process: Step 2: Subfloor preparation and moisture testing

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Long Beach homes?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often a good choice due to its stability in varying humidity levels. Consider UV-resistant finishes to combat sun exposure.

faq.question: How long does hardwood installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the project and the type of hardwood. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer hardwood floor repair?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer hardwood floor repair services, including patching, refinishing, and board replacement.

services.name: Tile Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish tile flooring for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description:
Tile flooring is a versatile and practical choice for Long Beach homes, especially in high-moisture areas like kitchens and bathrooms. Juan's Carpet Co. offers a wide selection of tile options, including ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone. Our expert installers ensure proper waterproofing and grout sealing to prevent leaks and mold growth, crucial in Long Beach's climate.

We handle all types of tile installations, from simple backsplashes to intricate floor patterns. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a level and even surface. We also offer tile repair and replacement services, addressing cracked or damaged tiles to restore the beauty and functionality of your floors.

Considering Long Beach's warm climate, tile flooring can help keep your home cool and comfortable. We can advise you on the best tile choices for energy efficiency and durability. Whether you're renovating a 1960s apartment or building a new home, we have the perfect tile flooring solution for you.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and material selection
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its water resistance and durability. We can help you select the perfect style and color.

faq.question: How do I clean tile floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping and mopping with a mild detergent are usually sufficient. Avoid harsh chemicals that can damage the grout.

faq.question: Do you offer tile repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer tile repair services, including replacing cracked or chipped tiles and re-grouting.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Comfort and warmth underfoot with professional carpet installation.
services.description:
Carpet provides comfort, warmth, and sound insulation, making it a popular choice for bedrooms and living rooms in Long Beach homes. Juan's Carpet Co. offers a wide selection of carpet styles, colors, and materials, including plush, Berber, and frieze. Our experienced installers ensure proper padding and stretching to prevent wrinkles and extend the life of your carpet.

We handle all aspects of carpet installation, from removing old flooring to installing new tack strips. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and professional finish. We also offer carpet repair and cleaning services, addressing stains, tears, and other damage to keep your carpet looking its best.

Given Long Beach's coastal environment, we recommend stain-resistant and moisture-resistant carpets to prevent mold and mildew growth. We can advise you on the best carpet choices for your lifestyle and budget. Whether you're renovating a historic home or updating a modern apartment, we have the perfect carpet solution for you.
process: Step 3: Padding and tack strip installation
Step 4: Precise carpet stretching and installation
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: What type of carpet is best for homes with pets?
faq.answer: Stain-resistant and durable carpets, such as nylon or olefin, are good choices for homes with pets. We can recommend specific brands and styles.

faq.question: How often should I clean my carpets?
faq.answer: We recommend professional carpet cleaning every 12-18 months to remove dirt, allergens, and stains.

faq.question: Do you offer carpet repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer carpet repair services, including patching, seam repair, and stain removal.

services.name: Laminate Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and durable laminate flooring for any room in your home.
services.description:
Laminate flooring offers a cost-effective and durable alternative to hardwood, providing the look and feel of real wood at a fraction of the price. Juan's Carpet Co. offers a wide selection of laminate styles, colors, and textures. Our experienced installers ensure a smooth and level surface, creating a beautiful and long-lasting floor.

We handle all aspects of laminate flooring installation, from subfloor preparation to installing baseboards. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and professional finish. We also offer laminate flooring repair services, addressing scratches, dents, and other damage to keep your floors looking their best.

Given Long Beach's warm climate, laminate flooring is a good choice for its resistance to fading and moisture. We can advise you on the best laminate choices for your lifestyle and budget. Whether you're renovating a rental property or updating your own home, we have the perfect laminate flooring solution for you.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate is water-resistant, it's not entirely waterproof. We recommend cleaning up spills promptly to prevent damage.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care, laminate flooring can last for 10-20 years or more.

faq.question: Do you offer laminate flooring repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer laminate flooring repair services, including replacing damaged planks and repairing scratches.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and stylish vinyl flooring for kitchens, bathrooms, and laundry rooms.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is a practical and affordable choice for high-moisture areas like kitchens, bathrooms, and laundry rooms in Long Beach homes. Juan's Carpet Co. offers a wide selection of vinyl styles, colors, and patterns, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). Our expert installers ensure proper subfloor preparation and sealing to prevent water damage and mold growth.

We handle all aspects of vinyl flooring installation, from removing old flooring to installing new baseboards. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and watertight finish. We also offer vinyl flooring repair services, addressing tears, dents, and other damage to keep your floors looking their best.

Given Long Beach's coastal environment, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for its resistance to moisture and mildew. We can advise you on the best vinyl choices for your lifestyle and budget. Whether you're renovating a beachfront property or updating a family home, we have the perfect vinyl flooring solution for you.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for pets?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is highly resistant to scratches and stains, making it a great choice for homes with pets.

faq.question: How long does vinyl flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care, vinyl flooring can last for 15-20 years or more.

faq.question: Do you offer vinyl flooring repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer vinyl flooring repair services, including patching tears and replacing damaged sections.

services.name: Flooring Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert repair services to restore the beauty and functionality of your floors.
services.description:
Even the most durable flooring can suffer damage over time. Juan's Carpet Co. offers comprehensive flooring repair services to restore the beauty and functionality of your floors. We handle all types of repairs, from patching holes in hardwood to replacing cracked tiles. Our experienced technicians use the highest quality materials and techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair.

We understand the importance of addressing flooring damage promptly to prevent further issues. We offer emergency repair services for water damage, fire damage, and other urgent situations. We also provide preventative maintenance services to help extend the life of your floors.

Given Long Beach's earthquake zone, we are experienced in repairing flooring damage caused by seismic activity. We can assess the structural integrity of your floors and recommend the best repair solutions to ensure your safety and peace of mind. Whether you have hardwood, tile, carpet, or laminate flooring, we have the expertise to restore it to its original condition.
process: Step 1: Damage assessment and repair plan
benefits: Restores the beauty of your floors
Extends the life of your flooring
Saves you money on replacement costs

faq.question: How much does flooring repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of flooring repair depends on the type of damage, the type of flooring, and the extent of the repair. We offer free estimates.

faq.question: How long does flooring repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of flooring repair depends on the complexity of the project. We will provide a detailed timeline during the estimate.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency flooring repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency flooring repair services for urgent situations.

services.name: Subfloor Repair and Leveling
services.shortDescription: Ensuring a solid foundation for your new or existing flooring.
services.description:
A stable and level subfloor is essential for a successful flooring installation. Juan's Carpet Co. specializes in subfloor repair and leveling, addressing issues like cracks, moisture damage, and uneven surfaces. We use advanced techniques and high-quality materials to create a solid foundation for your new or existing flooring.

We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation, especially in older Long Beach homes that may have settling or structural issues. We conduct thorough inspections to identify any underlying problems and recommend the best solutions.

Given Long Beach's coastal climate, we pay close attention to moisture control in the subfloor. We use moisture barriers and other techniques to prevent mold and mildew growth, ensuring a healthy and long-lasting floor. Whether you're installing new flooring or repairing existing floors, we can ensure a stable and level subfloor for optimal performance.
process: Step 2: Repair of cracks, holes, and damage
Step 3: Leveling and smoothing of the subfloor
benefits: Ensures a stable and level floor
Extends the life of your flooring
Improves the overall appearance of your home

faq.question: Why is subfloor repair important?
faq.answer: A damaged or uneven subfloor can cause flooring to crack, warp, or become uneven. Repairing the subfloor ensures a smooth and long-lasting flooring installation.

faq.question: How do I know if my subfloor needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of subfloor damage include cracks, unevenness, squeaking, and moisture stains. We can conduct a thorough inspection to assess the condition of your subfloor.

faq.question: How long does subfloor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of subfloor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of subfloor. We will provide a detailed timeline during the estimate.

serviceAreas.content:
Juan's Carpet Co is proud to offer our expert flooring installation services to the residents and businesses of Los Angeles. From the iconic homes of Hollywood to the vibrant downtown area, we understand the diverse needs of this sprawling metropolis. We are committed to providing top-quality flooring solutions that complement the unique architectural styles found throughout Los Angeles, including the prevalent 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival designs. 

Whether you're looking to upgrade your home with hardwood floors, install new carpets in your office, or add tile to your kitchen, Juan's Carpet Co has the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We offer a wide selection of flooring materials to choose from, and our skilled installers will ensure a flawless finish. We understand the warm, dry climate of Los Angeles and can recommend materials ideal for the environment.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles boasts a diverse architectural landscape, with a strong presence of 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival homes. Its warm, dry climate influences flooring choices.

serviceAreas.content:
Juan's Carpet Co is delighted to provide flooring installation services to the beautiful city of Pasadena. Known for its rich history and stunning architecture, particularly the 1910s-30s Craftsman bungalows, Pasadena demands a flooring company that understands its unique character. We are dedicated to providing flooring solutions that enhance the charm and elegance of Pasadena homes and businesses.

From classic hardwood floors to stylish carpets and durable tile, Juan's Carpet Co offers a wide range of flooring options to suit your needs. Our experienced installers will ensure a perfect fit and finish, complementing the Craftsman aesthetic and other architectural styles found throughout Pasadena. We are also mindful of Pasadena's warm, dry climate when recommending the best flooring materials.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Juan and his team did an amazing job installing hardwood floors in my living room. They were professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. I highly recommend Juan's Carpet Co.!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Juan's Carpet Co. to install tile in our kitchen. The quality of the work was excellent, and the price was very reasonable. There was a small delay due to a material shortage, but Juan kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Linda P.
reviews.text: Juan's team installed new carpet in our bedrooms, and we couldn't be happier. They were very careful with our furniture and cleaned up thoroughly after the job. The carpet is so soft and comfortable!

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: I had Juan's Carpet Co. install laminate flooring in my home office. They were very professional and efficient, and the floors look great. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: Juan's Carpet Co. installed vinyl flooring in our bathroom. They did a good job, but there was a small issue with the sealing around the toilet. Juan came back and fixed it promptly.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Juan repaired some water damage to our hardwood floors. He did an excellent job, and you can't even tell there was any damage. I highly recommend his services.
